assetFormat: SAC (contract C... address); token_in_address = BLND SAC, token_out_address = USDC SAC
amountFormat: stroops (raw 7-decimal integer as string). 1000 BLND = "10000000000". The API does NOT auto-scale: sending "1000" is interpreted as 1000 stroops (0.0001 BLND) and returns a nonsense 51-stroop quote.
